positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast illustration of fantastical jungle flora, featuring bioluminescent lotuses and stylized ferns. The arrangement should be highly detailed yet clean, utilizing a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, vivid teal, and glowing gold accents. Style should combine Art Deco symmetry with modern botanical illustration (etching, woodcut quality). The composition must be centrally framed and isolated on a solid, minimal background for optimal apparel placement. Vector art quality, perfect silhouette, strong ornamental pattern, high depth of field, clean lines, symmetrical composition, print-ready.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, trademark, anime, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grimy, realistic photography, gradient background
